home.hero.title: Explore Places Around You
home.hero.subtitle: Take a break from daily stress, plan your trip, and explore your favorite destinations together.
home.about.label: About Us
home.about.heading_1: We craft journeys around the world
home.about.heading_2: blending iconic destinations and hidden gems to deliver authentic, memorable experiences.
home.about.p1: Our team of place lovers, local experts, and travel specialists is dedicated to creating unique and meaningful experiences.
home.about.p2: From vibrant cities to calming nature and beaches, we bring the best experience to every journey.
home.about.stat1: Travelers would recommend us to their friends and family.
home.about.stat2: Unique trip plans crafted to showcase the beauty of Indonesia.
home.about.stat3: Average rating of 4.9/5 from hundreds of satisfied customers.

home.gallery.label: Gallery
home.gallery.desc: Step into the world through our curated gallery, capturing the beauty, culture, and unforgettable moments of our journeys across the country.
home.contact.label: Contact Us
home.contact.subtitle: Have questions or ideas for your holiday? Reach out to us here and let's make your trip more fun, together!

footer.desc: Traveling home and around is no longer a solo journey. Find friends heading your way, share stories, and make every kilometer more fun, together!
